'''James R. Novak'''<ref name="death" /> is a comic book [[Wikipedia:Letterer|letterer]] for [[Marvel Comics]]. He worked on a few comics in the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series.

{{Artist-stub}}
